fields.value: Will the Onion + Peptides treatment make my hair smell like onion?

{"type":"root","children":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"type":"text","value":"No. All products in our Onion + Peptides range have a fresh, floral fragrance. The onion extract is added only for its stimulating properties and has no odor. "}]}]}
Is it safe to use this treatment on chemically treated/colored hair?

{"type":"root","children":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"type":"text","value":"Yes. These formulas are suitable for all hair types and can be used safely on colored or chemically treated hair. "}]}]}
How long will the full routine last me?

{"type":"root","children":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"type":"text","value":"Our routine is designed to last 1 month with daily use, but it may last longer depending on how often you wash your hair and whether you double cleanse each wash."}]}]}
Can I combine the Onion + Peptides treatment with other products?

{"type":"root","children":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"type":"text","value":"While the serum can be used with other products, our shampoo and conditioner are created to work synergistically. We recommend using the complete treatment for 3 months to obtain full benefits."}]}]}
Why add water before applying shampoo?

{"type":"root","children":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"type":"text","value":"Because shampoo needs water to activate and distribute properly. Adding a few drops of water and rubbing it between your hands before applying encourages more foam. Wetting hair thoroughly helps cleanse effectively without irritating the scalp or overloading the hair."}]}]}

{"type":"root","children":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"type":"text","value":"As often as you need. Our shampoos are sulfate‑free, so they cleanse gently without stripping the scalp’s essential oils or disrupting its pH."}]}]}

{"type":"root","children":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"type":"text","value":"The first shampoo removes dirt and residue; the second allows the shampoo to act and treat the scalp properly, leaving hair cleaner and healthier."}]}]}

Improves quality of emerging fiber: thicker, more resilient to touch and more resistant to daily damage.
Penetrates instantly to transform dry, straw‑like hair into fluid, manageable silk. Noticeable from the first drop.
Its lipids act like natural glue, temporarily joining split ends for a polished, defined finish.
Aligns cuticles to reflect light evenly, removing dullness and restoring life to hair.
Exceptional tocopherol and squalene content protects the fiber from environmental oxidation and premature aging.
Acts as a botanical sunshield that blocks up to 30% of UV radiation, preventing color and protein degradation.
Unlike oils that sit on the surface, sesame nourishes the cortex thanks to its unique lipid profile.
Antibacterial properties (sesamol and sesamin) help keep the scalp clean, purified and toxin‑free.
Improves texture of thinned hair, delivering a real sense of increased density and root volume.
Reduces the scalp’s silent inflammation (what you don’t see but your hair feels), creating fertile ground for growth.
Stimulates production of the structural proteins that build hair, improving quality of each new strand.
Stimulates the scalp to produce its own protective lipids, autonomously strengthening the skin barrier.
Traps water inside the hair like a molecular sponge, maintaining internal hydration for days.
Restores flexibility to stiff hair so it moves naturally, can be gathered and released without breaking.
Fills surface imperfections, leaving hair soft to the touch and noticeably easier to comb.
Oligomeric procyanidins (OPC) protect scalp collagen from degradation, keeping the follicle firm and youthful.
Nourishes intensely without weight or greasy residue. The perfect oil for fine or oily‑prone hair.
Seals environmental moisture out of the fiber, keeping styles polished and frizz‑free even on humid days.
High linoleic acid content regulates sebum production without clogging follicles. Less oil, more balance.
High oleic acid content softens even the coarsest, most unruly hair with an immediate silky feel.
Coats the fiber with biomimetic lipids (similar to your own sebum) that restore healthy shine and vitality.
Hydroxytyrosol—one of nature’s most potent antioxidants—preserves structural integrity of hair against free radicals.
